shellCommands.command:
SERVER_PORT=3000 java -jar target/*.jar &
sleep 5
# Test without name
echo "=== Test: no name ==="
curl -s http://localhost:3000/
echo ""
# Test with name
echo "=== Test: with name ==="
curl -s "http://localhost:3000/?name=World"
echo ""
# Test with whitespace padding
echo "=== Test: with whitespace ==="
curl -s "http://localhost:3000/?name=%20%20Hello%20%20"
echo ""
# Test with empty string
echo "=== Test: empty name ==="
curl -s "http://localhost:3000/?name="
echo ""
# Test with blank name (just spaces)
echo "=== Test: blank name ==="
curl -s "http://localhost:3000/?name=%20%20%20"
echo ""
# Stop the server
kill %1 2>/dev/null || true
